experiment: M2: from-scratch calib-shaped jumpy (calib_coef 0.1 q 0.9) vs existing plain-jumpy baselines (phasei27_jum)

pre_registered_predictions.Cab: calib-jumpy final BEATS plain jumpy (1050, n=5) — the measured-miscalibration task; this is where the method must pay
pre_registered_predictions.Ori: calib-jumpy within CI of plain jumpy (2145) — already calibrated (1.33), nothing to fix
pre_registered_predictions.Pick: calib-jumpy within CI of plain jumpy (1969, n=8) — already calibrated (1.12)

falsification: calib hurting Ori/Pick (pinball tax) OR failing to beat plain jumpy on Cab kills the method claim
note: committed before any M2 run starts; baselines are historical and already public
